deployment_context: ODR recommendation used only after prior authorization, appeal notice, source trace and human-review override.

S.evidence: Platform rules, consumer law sources and terms are versioned and linked.

Q.evidence: Claim facts, rule filters, policy version and model version are recorded.

H.evidence: Consumer statute overrides, platform rules and terms of service are distinguished.

K.evidence: Exception policies, appeal decisions and human-review overrides are surfaced.

T.evidence: The party can inspect, appeal and obtain a recorded response.

L.evidence: Responsible reviewer, adopted materials and reasons are recorded.
